docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVIER, ANGELIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVADO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ANGELIQUE OLIVIER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
